plugins.name: cloudflare-core
plugins.description: Core Cloudflare context: API and docs MCP servers, plus the platform overview skill. Install alongside the per-product plugins below.

plugins.name: cloudflare-workers
plugins.description: Cloudflare Workers: Wrangler CLI, best practices, bindings, and builds. Pair with cloudflare-core.

plugins.name: cloudflare-observability
plugins.description: Cloudflare Workers Observability: query logs and metrics. Pair with cloudflare-workers.

plugins.name: cloudflare-durable-objects
plugins.description: Cloudflare Durable Objects: stateful coordination. Pair with cloudflare-workers.

plugins.name: cloudflare-agents
plugins.description: Cloudflare Agents SDK for building AI agents on Workers. Pair with cloudflare-workers.

plugins.name: cloudflare-sandbox
plugins.description: Cloudflare Sandbox SDK for secure code execution. Pair with cloudflare-workers.

plugins.name: cloudflare-email
plugins.description: Cloudflare Email Service: transactional email and routing. Pair with cloudflare-core.

plugins.name: cloudflare-web-perf
plugins.description: Web performance auditing with Chrome DevTools MCP. No Cloudflare dependency.

plugins.name: cloudflare
plugins.description: Umbrella plugin: all Cloudflare skills and MCP servers in a single install. Use for full developer-platform context; install per-product plugins above for narrower scope.
